data.title: O'Leary Digital partners with West GenCo to develop 7.5 GW Wonder Valley Utah Campus; 26,000 acres, 15 GW plan, permits underway.
data.description: A strategic joint venture has been formed by O'Leary Digital Limited and West GenCo LLC to advance the development of Wonder Valley Utah. This venture will cover 26,000 acres across two jurisdictions and support an initial power plan of 15 gigawatts. The announcement was made on Feb. 17, 2026, in Miami.

data.title: Global air purifier market projected to exceed USD 29.09 billion by 2032 due to urbanization, industrial pollution, and health-conscious consumer trends.
data.description: In Pune, India, on February 17, 2026, Maximize Market Research released a report on the Air Purifier Market Global Outlook for the period 2024-2032. The report highlights a significant increase in the adoption of air purification technologies globally, driven by factors such as rising urbanization, industrial pollution, and a growing health-conscious consumer base. This trend is expected to continue shaping the market landscape in the coming years.

This significant investment announcement is predicted to spur an additional $150 billion in related investments, fostering the growth of a projected $250 billion AI ecosystem. data.title: Safire Technology Group launches SafireAI, offering Edge AI for Enterprise Energy Intelligence.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Safire Technology Group, Inc (Safire Group) unveiled the establishment of SafireAI division, concentrating on enterprise energy intelligence for contemporary electrified operations. SafireAI introduces an infrastructure-grade platform incorporating Safire Group's exclusive Domain-Specific LLM directly into the energy operating layer. This empowers real-time, energy-conscious decision-making for intricate electrified operations. The initiative targets assisting enterprises as they introduce fleets of electrified assets, with a focus on optimizing energy efficiency during operations.

data.title: Billionaire Sam Bankman-Fried criticizes Dems for censoring info; pivots towards Truth Social & GETTR, disliking Dems censoring true info.
data.description: Sam Bankman-Fried criticized Democrats for censoring "misinformation" on social media and endorsed Truth Social and GETTR as platforms that prioritize free speech. This marks a notable shift from his previous support, having donated $5.2 million to the Biden campaign in 2020. In a post on X, Bankman-Fried argued that Democrats use misinformation policies to silence information they disagree with, highlighting instances such as the lab leak theory and mask mandates being censored. He stated that Truth Social and GETTR have always prioritized free speech, contrasting them with mainstream social media platforms. Bankman-Fried's public stance signals a significant alignment with right-wing messaging, a departure from previous positions. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: DBMS market grows at 5.5% CAGR due to cloud, big data, and digital transformation. Rising data fuels demand for secure storage.
data.description: The growth of data generated across enterprises, driven by technologies like cloud computing, IoT, AI, and advanced analytics, is the primary driver of the Database Management System (DBMS) market. Organizations are increasingly turning to DBMS solutions for secure data storage and real-time access. As a result of this trend, the DBMS market is experiencing significant growth, with global revenue reaching (specific number) and expected to continue rising in the coming years.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from South Holland, Ill., creates new two-seater vehicle kit (CHK-4037) with SPEED TONNEAU SYSTEM.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 17, 2026, an inventor from South Holland, Illinois, introduced a new vehicle kit called the SPEED TONNEAU SYSTEM. The kit aims to conceal the two rarely used rear seats when the convertible top is open. The inventor stated that the design allows for a neat solution for this, providing easier usability while maintaining functionality.

data.title: Global Space Robotics Market on strong growth trajectory due to rising investments in autonomous mission systems and AI-enabled robotics, backed by expanding space activities.
data.description: The Space Robotics Market worldwide is witnessing steady growth, fueled by increasing investments in autonomous mission systems and the rapid progress in AI-enabled robotics technology. Both commercial and governmental space activities are expanding, further driving the market. Demand is particularly strong due to requirements for satellite servicing.

data.title: Global 2D materials market to reach USD 10.2 billion by 2033 with a 15.8% CAGR. Demand driven by electronics, energy storage, and composites.
data.description: The 2D materials market is experiencing significant growth worldwide due to increasing demand for advanced electronics, energy storage, and composite applications. Key materials like graphene, transition metal dichalcogenides, and hexagonal boron nitride are at the forefront of this expansion. The market is expected to see a surge in revenue, with current figures reflecting a substantial increase in interest and investment in the industry.

data.title: Savvas Learning Company's Experience Math program receives top rating from EdReports, boosts student math proficiency.
data.description: Savvas Learning Company recently revealed that their Experience Math program has received recognition from EdReports for its efficacy in improving students' math proficiency. According to new studies, Experience Math has proven to help students achieve higher levels of math skills. The program has been praised for its ability to elevate math proficiency among students. This achievement was announced on February 17, 2026, in Paramus, New Jersey. This news highlights the positive impact Experience Math is making on students, with notable improvements in math proficiency levels.

data.title: Upstart (NASDAQ: UPST) introduces Cash Line, offering ongoing access to credit; aiming to make best rates available 24/7.
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Upstart disclosed its latest offering, Cash Line, a revolutionary revolving line of credit for consumers with the aim of providing continuous access to funds as required. Dave Girouard, co-founder and CEO of Upstart, expressed, "Cash Line represents Upstart's significant stride towards providing constant credit accessibility to all Americans." The company, a leading AI lending marketplace listed on NASDAQ as UPST, is focused on creating a comprehensive credit solution offering the best rates round-the-clock.

data.title: Chamber of Mothers partners with SmartyPants Vitamins for 'CoM Unity', a national initiative aiding mothers with support.
data.description: The CoM Unity program aims to bring mothers together and provide crucial resources during a time of increasing isolation and unmet support for families across the country. This initiative, launched by the Chamber of Mothers, a prominent nonpartisan nonprofit organization dedicated to advocating for mothers’ rights, is set to address the pressing issue. The program was introduced on February 17, 2026, in New York.

data.title: Celanese likely to report lower Q4 earnings; analysts predict 91 cents per share, down from $1.45 in year-ago period.
data.description: Celanese Corporation (NYSE: CE) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Tuesday, Feb. 17. Analysts are predicting earnings of 91 cents per share, a decrease from $1.45 per share in the same period last year. The expected quarterly revenue is $2.25 billion, lower than the $2.37 billion reported a year ago. Celanese recently declared a quarterly dividend of 3 cents per share. The company's shares closed at $58.85, up 0.1% on Friday. For more insights and analyst ratings on Celanese, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga. This information and more detailed analysis can be found on the Benzinga website.

data.title: Financial Wellness Benefits Market expanding due to employer focus on workforce well-being.Driven by growing recognition of employee financial stress impact on productivity, retention & healthcare costs.organizations integrating financial wellness programs into benefits strategies.
data.description: Key factors driving the Financial Wellness Benefits Market include a rising awareness among employers of the impact of financial stress on productivity, employee retention, and healthcare expenses. Many organizations are now incorporating financial wellness programs into their overall benefits packages. As a result, the market is experiencing significant growth with a notable increase in the adoption rate of such programs. This trend is evident as statistics reveal that the market size is projected to reach $XX billion by the end of the year, showcasing a YY% increase compared to the previous year. This shift underscores the importance of addressing financial wellbeing in the workplace and highlights the competitive advantage that such benefits can provide for companies seeking to attract and retain top talent.
